response.justification: Bogdan meets the 15-year experience minimum and demonstrates exceptional technical breadth across full-stack, infrastructure, and DevOps domains. However, the role specifically requires demonstrated expertise in AI with built products or platforms. While his current role includes AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, the resume lacks evidence of deep ML/AI knowledge, published research, or AI-focused product development. His background is stronger as a senior IC than a director-level strategic specialist. His recent pivot to AI infrastructure is noteworthy and warrants exploration of whether this represents genuine strategic expertise or operational involvement.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience with exceptional technical breadth (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) and polyglot programming skills
Proven infrastructure and DevOps expertise (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, AWS CDK) with experience at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated teaching and community leadership through workshops, conference talks, and ongoing open-source stewardship of GISCollective
concerns: Limited evidence of deep AI/ML expertise; current AI work appears operationally focused (agent infrastructure, MCP) rather than strategic or research-driven
Background is primarily senior IC contributor, not director-level strategic leader with evidence of influencing organizational direction or advising customers on cutting-edge technologies
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or published research; lacks the 'recognized expertise' in AI that the role explicitly prefers
